TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Paudadan, title = Paudadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paudadan} }

S.FORM: Paudadan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Paudadan a niyaro', 254 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 727 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 526 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 201 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: pao~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan itiniaj i xin ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u pao~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, taja…ĺ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u **%, k…ôb~b~va…ĺan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Paudadan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Paudadan a niyaro', 254 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 727 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 526 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 201 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, roma 3%.
